content: hi mere project ko scaan kerke dekho kya ye sabhi apas me link  hai na

Namaste! Maine aapke project ko scan kiya hai, aur mujhe lagta hai ki ake saare components aur services ek dusre se link hain. 

Aapka project mein `backend` aur `frontend` hisse hain. Backend mein Express.js server setup hai, aur frontend Vite.js setup hai. Donose ek dusre se judi hui hain, aur aapke application ke different parts ek dusre se communicate kar rahe hain.

Aapke `app.js` file mein, aapne saare routes ko define kiya hai, jaise ki `leadRoutes`, `callRoutes`, `formRoutes`, etc. Ye routes aapke application ke alag-alag hisson ko handle karte hain.

Aapke `frontend` mein, aapne components aur services ko define kiya hai, jaise ki `LeadCard`, `CallCard`, `Sidebar`, etc. Ye components aapke application ke UI ko handle karte hain, aur aapke services aapke backend se data fetch karte hain.

Mujhe lagta hai ki aapke project mein sab kuch theek hai, aur aapke components aur services ek dusre se achhi tarah se link hain. Lekin, agar aapko koi specific problem hai ya koi specific hissa mein issue hai, to mujhe batayein, main aapki madad karne ki koshish karunga.
